choices.text: Address (32-byte pubkey), owner (program controlling writes), lamports (SOL balance), data (serialized bytes), executable (is program?). All on-chain state lives in accounts.
Address Lookup Tables (ALT) + Versioned Transactions (V0). ALT stores accounts on-chain; tx references by 1-byte index instead of 32 bytes. Fits within 1,232-byte tx size limit.

questions.explanation: ALT + V0 transactions for many-account ops.
